recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: Three high school seniors throw a party to make a name for themselves. As the night progresses, things spiral out of control as word of the party spreads.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Nerds
recommendations.overview: At Adams College, the jocks rule the school from their house on high, the Alpha Beta fraternity. So when a group of socially-challenged misfits try to go Greek, they're instantly rejected by every house on campus. Deciding to start their own fraterni

recommendations.title: Appropriate Behavior
recommendations.overview: Shirin is struggling to become an ideal Persian daughter, politically correct bisexual and hip young Brooklynite but fails miserably in her attempt at all identities.

recommendations.title: American Pie Presents: Beta House
recommendations.overview: Erik, Ryan, and Cooze start college and pledge the Beta House fraternity, presided over by none other than legendary Dwight Stifler. But chaos ensues when a fraternity of geeks threatens to stop the debauchery and the Betas have to make a stand for t

recommendations.title: Party Central
recommendations.overview: Mike and Sulley are back at Monsters University for a fun-filled weekend with their Oozma Kappa fraternity brothers. The gang is throwing their first party, but no one’s showing up. Luckily for them, Mike and Sulley have come up with a plan to make s

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
recommendations.overview: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: Premature
recommendations.overview: On the most important day of his young life, a high school senior is forced to relive his failed attempt at losing his virginity over and over again, until he gets it right.

recommendations.title: A Good Old Fashioned Orgy
recommendations.overview: A group of 30-year-olds who have been friends since high school attempt to throw an end-of-summer orgy.
